mechanicalNotes: All scheduled maintenance performed at authorized Porsche dealer. No accidents reported. Sport Chrono package equipped. PASM sport suspension.
Older restoration completed in 2010. Engine rebuilt with period-correct components. Some patina on chrome trim. Runs and drives well. Numbers-matching drivetrain.
Competition package with adaptive M suspension. Carbon fiber roof. Minor curb rash on right rear wheel. All maintenance current through BMW dealer.
Bone stock, never modified. Original turbo and exhaust. Timing belt service at 58k miles. Garage kept. Some minor rock chips on front bumper. T-top model.
Sasquatch package with 35-inch tires and front/rear locking differentials. Lux package with heated seats. No off-road abuse. Dealer maintained.
Original paint in excellent condition. Soft top replaced in 2020. Clutch replaced at 38k miles. All VINs match. No modifications. Clean title.
Full Self-Driving capability included. Track Mode enabled. Acceleration boost active. Battery health at 94%. Small paint chip on hood. Ceramic coated.
Frame-off restoration completed 2018. Numbers-matching LS5 454 engine. Cowl induction hood. Rally wheels with redline tires. Build sheet documented.
AMG Line exterior. Burmester audio system. 360-degree camera. Adaptive damping. Regularly serviced at authorized dealer. Minor swirl marks in paint.

Completely stock engine and exhaust. DCCD AWD system. BBS wheels. Brembo brakes. Short shifter installed (original included). Recent timing belt service. One repainted fender from minor parking lot incident.
Z51 Performance package. Magnetic ride control. Front axle lift. Performance exhaust. Carbon flash-painted nacelles. No track days. Garage kept under cover.
Rare Ultrasonic Blue color. Original Torsen LSD. Staggered 19-inch BBS wheels. Brake pads recently replaced. Maintenance records since new. No modifications.
European-spec model imported to US in 2005. Timing chain and tensioner replaced at 98k. A/C converted to R134a. Slight oil weep from valve cover gasket. Paint is original with touchups on nose.
Performance edition with 605 hp. Dynamic Plus package. Carbon optic package. Carbon ceramic brakes. Sport exhaust with black tips. 21-inch forged wheels.
All four options: painted calipers, stripes, McIntosh audio, and forged BBS wheels. All service bulletins addressed. Stored climate-controlled. Original window sticker and both keys included.
Rock-Trac 4WD with 4:1 low range. Dana 44 axles with lockers. 2-inch Mopar lift with Fox shocks. 33-inch BFG KO2 tires. Light trail use, no rock crawling damage.
Legally imported under Show or Display exemption. V-Spec II with upgraded Brembo brakes. NISMO turbos installed at 35k km. Maintained by GT-R specialist. All service records from Japan included.
TRD Pro with FOX internal bypass shocks. TRD skid plate. Multi-terrain select. Crawl control. Rare 6-speed manual. Bed has minor scratches from use. Tonneau cover included.
R1 package (lightweight, no sunroof, no rear speakers). Turbos rebuilt at 60k. Compression test shows healthy apex seals. Original R1 wheels. Suede steering wheel. A/C blows cold.
Max pack battery (180 kWh). Powered tonneau cover. Camp kitchen included. Underbody shield. Air suspension. Gear tunnel. No issues, dealer maintained.
Sport Chrono. Air suspension recently serviced with new compressor. PDCC active roll stabilization. 21-inch RS Spyder wheels. Timing chain guides replaced at 65k as preventative.
Concours-quality restoration in 2019. Matching-numbers 440 Magnum. Dana 60 rear axle. Rallye gauge cluster. Documented with Galen Govier fender tag decode. Broadcast sheet.
LDVI (Lamborghini Dinamica Veicolo Integrata) system. Lifting system for front axle. Transparent engine bonnet. Sensonum audio. Full PPF on front clip. No track use.
Canadian-market FK2 Type R. Limited production run. +R mode. Brembo front brakes. Adaptive dampers. Light stone chip marks on bumper. Never tracked. Complete service history.
Air suspension working but front left bag showing age. Supercharger recently serviced. New front brakes. Panoramic roof functional. Some wear on driver seat bolster. 22-inch wheels with new tires.
Top-exit exhaust. Senna-inspired seats. Carbon fiber exterior pack. MSO Defined clubsport pro pack. Nose lift. Stealth pack. No accidents. Serviced by McLaren dealer.
VOI9 special edition. One of the last first-gen coupes. K&N intake. Corsa exhaust. Clutch replaced at 15k miles. Brand new Michelin Pilot Super Sports. Paint correction and ceramic coat in 2024.
N Performance package. Electronic limited-slip differential. Launch control. Rev matching. NGS (N Grin Shift) button. Variable exhaust. Bone stock. Still under factory warranty.
Rust-free Arizona truck. Frame in solid condition. Engine runs well but burns some oil. New clutch and throwout bearing. Power steering converted. ARB front bumper. Old Man Emu suspension lift.
Sport Plus seats. Convenience package. Technology package with 360 cameras. Dealer maintained with full records. PPF on front. New Pirelli P Zero tires at 12k miles.
First year of the Golf R in US market. Haldex AWD. 256 hp stock. Carbon buildup cleaned at 75k. Timing chain tensioner updated. DSG fluid service done. OEM 18-inch Talladega wheels.
Carbon fiber racing seats. Carbon fiber driving zone. LED steering wheel. JBL audio upgrade. Scuderia shields. Front and rear parking cameras. Annual service current. No stories.
Power Wagon with disconnecting front sway bar. Winch. Locking front and rear differentials. 33-inch Goodyear Wrangler tires. Bed lined with LINE-X. Tow mirrors. Some chips on hood.
Last year of the 944. Fresh timing belt and water pump. New convertible top in 2022 (black). A/C recharged. Power steering rack rebuilt. Minor lacquer peel on rear bumper.
Morizo Edition: rear seats deleted, close-ratio gearbox, Torsen LSDs front and rear, lightweight forged wheels. 300 hp. One of ~200 produced for 2024. Zero modifications. Break-in service completed.
Black Series wide-body. Aerodynamics package. Track package deleted (street-focused). Adjustable coilovers from factory. Head bolt recall addressed. Valve guides in good shape per inspection.
Last of the 4G63-powered Evos. MR model with bilstein shocks and BBS wheels. ACD and AYC active differentials. Clutch at 80%. Minor boost leak fixed. Stock turbo. Clean title, no accidents.

Prestige package with 3D digital instrument cluster. 14.5-inch infotainment. Lexicon audio. Remote parking. 22-inch wheels. Road Force balanced. Minor door ding on passenger rear. Extended warranty to 100k.

Series 1 car with flat-top dashboard. Rust-free California car. Engine rebuilt 15k miles ago with rebuilt SU carburetors. Original 4-speed. Battery relocated to trunk. Tokico shocks. Needs new weatherstripping.
M Carbon bucket seats. M Carbon exterior package. M Drive Professional with drift analyzer. Head-up display. Harman Kardon. Carbon fiber intakes. No modifications. Break-in service complete.
